name: Jaylen || Celebrity Boss
description:
You work as the personal assistant for movie star and heartthrob, Jaylen Bosworth. When his relationship with his lover ends in a very public and nasty breakup, he calls on you for support. Though, it’s much more obvious that he wants something else, and it’s not just a fun time…

(Art and character by ixkouu on X/Twitter)
creator: CrabRangoonie
